3266180.name: Void Phantom
3266180.description:
Void Phantom is a roguelike shooter set in a vast space universe where skill and strategy are the keys to survival. Pilot a customizable starship and engage in breathtaking battles against titanic bosses and relentless waves of enemies.

Story

In a distant future, humanity is just one of many races vying for control of unexplored galaxies. You are the captain of a solitary ship, the "Phantom," a living legend in the cosmos' fringes. Explore ancient secrets, confront alien threats, and uncover the truth behind the mysterious "Void," a zone of the universe shrouded in mysteries and dangers.

Key Features

  • Epic Space Battles
    Engage in intense real-time naval combat against a wide variety of enemies, including massive space bosses with unique abilities and deadly attack patterns. Every battle is a challenge that will test your piloting and strategic skills.

  • Stunning Pixel Art
    Void Phantom combines the retro aesthetics of pixel art with modern detail, creating breathtaking space environments and incredible enemy designs. The universe comes alive with vibrant colors and classic-inspired designs.

  • Ship Customization
    Build and upgrade your ship with an arsenal of devastating weapons and advanced modules. Customize every aspect of your vessel to fit your playstyle: from firepower to defense to special abilities.

  • Roguelike Progression
    Each run offers new challenges and opportunities. Test yourself in procedurally generated levels where every decision counts. Collect resources, upgrade your ship, and return stronger after each run.

  • Challenges and Achievements
    Complete tough missions and unlock objectives that grant you access to special rewards. Only the best pilots will master the void and earn the title of "Phantom Legend."

  • Immersive Soundtrack
    Experience your epic space adventure with an original soundtrack that captures the intensity of battles and the mystery of the cosmos. Each melody is designed to accompany you on your journey through the stars.

An Universe to Explore

Explore uncharted sectors of space filled with secrets, side missions, and unexpected discoveries. The cosmos of Void Phantom is vast and mysterious, with deep lore for those ready to dig beneath the surface.
